notableEvents.label: Otto Lopez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Otto Lopez hit by pitch. Xavier Edwards to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Xavier Edwards GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Xavier Edwards grounds into a double play, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Jakob Marsee out at 2nd. Xavier Edwards out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Xavier Edwards rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Xavier Edwards grounds into a double play, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Jakob Marsee out at 2nd. Xavier Edwards out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Slater pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Slater walks. Connor Norby to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Graham Pauley GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Graham Pauley grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Heriberto Hernández out at 2nd. Graham Pauley out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Graham Pauley rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Graham Pauley grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Heriberto Hernández out at 2nd. Graham Pauley out at 1st.
